chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ إِلَى صَاحِبِ الدَّارِ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 76 – The Indication and the wordings upon the Master<sup>asws</sup> of the world (12<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مختلف فيه - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/1)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مختلف فيه - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/1)
text: خَرَجَ إِلَيَّ مِنْ أَبِي مُحَمَّدٍ قَبْلَ مُضِيِّهِ بِسَنَتَيْنِ يُخْبِرُنِي بِالْخَلَفِ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ ثُمَّ خَرَجَ إِلَيَّ مِنْ قَبْلِ مُضِيِّهِ بِثَلَاثَةِ أَيَّامٍ يُخْبِرُنِي بِالْخَلَفِ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Ali Bin Bilal who said,

‘There came out to me from Abu Muhammad<sup>asws</sup> (11<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>) before his<sup>asws</sup> passing away by two years informing me of the replacement (Imam<sup>asws</sup>) from after him<sup>asws</sup>. Then there came to me from before his<sup>asws</sup> passing away by three days informing me with the replacement (Imam<sup>asws</sup> from after him<sup>asws</sup>)’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from Muhammad ibn Ali ibn Bilal who has said the following. “Two years before his leaving this world, abu Muhammad (a.s.)sent out information to me about the succeeding Imam after him. Just three days before his leaving this world he again sent out information to me about the succeeding Imam after him.”
